findings.title: Root account MFA is disabled
findings.fix: Enable hardware MFA on root account. Lock away root credentials after setup.

findings.title: Policy 'DevFullAccess' grants Action:* Resource:* (full admin)
findings.fix: Scope policy to minimum required actions and specific resource ARNs.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'prod-customer-pii' has no public access block
findings.fix: Enable all 4 S3 Block Public Access settings. Audit ACLs and bucket policies.

findings.title: SG 'prod-web' exposes SSH (port 22) to 0.0.0.0/0
findings.fix: Restrict SSH to specific IP ranges or route through VPN/bastion host. Never expose to 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: SG 'prod-db' exposes MySQL (port 3306) to 0.0.0.0/0
findings.fix: Restrict MySQL to specific IP ranges or route through VPN/bastion host. Never expose to 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: SG 'mgmt' exposes SSH (port 22) to 0.0.0.0/0
findings.fix: Restrict SSH to specific IP ranges or route through VPN/bastion host. Never expose to 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: SG 'mgmt' exposes RDP (port 3389) to 0.0.0.0/0
findings.fix: Restrict RDP to specific IP ranges or route through VPN/bastion host. Never expose to 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: SG 'old-test' (sg-005) allows ALL inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0
findings.fix: Delete the all-traffic rule. Add specific rules for only required ports and sources.

findings.title: Console user 'bob' has no MFA
findings.fix: Enforce MFA for bob. Apply IAM policy denying all actions without MFA.

findings.title: SG 'prod-db' exposes PostgreSQL (port 5432) to 0.0.0.0/0
findings.fix: Restrict PostgreSQL to specific IP ranges or route through VPN/bastion host. Never expose to 0.0.0.0/0.

findings.title: Access key for 'bob' is 102 days old
findings.fix: Rotate key for bob. Create new → update apps → disable old → delete.

findings.title: Access key for 'ci-bot' is 134 days old
findings.fix: Rotate key for ci-bot. Create new → update apps → disable old → delete.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'internal-docs' has no default encryption
findings.fix: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS as default encryption. Use KMS CMK for PII buckets.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'dev-scratch' has no default encryption
findings.fix: Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS as default encryption. Use KMS CMK for PII buckets.

findings.title: CloudTrail log file validation is disabled
S3 bucket 'internal-docs' has no access logging
findings.fix: Enable server access logging to a central security bucket.

findings.title: S3 bucket 'dev-scratch' has no access logging
findings.fix: Enable server access logging to a central security bucket.
